display_name: FirstProof P4: 自由卷积根分离不等式 (Gemini-3-Pro)
benchmark_scope: Prove that 1/Phi_n(p ⊞_n q) >= 1/Phi_n(p) + 1/Phi_n(q) for monic real-rooted polynomials p, q of degree n, where ⊞_n is finite free convolution and Phi_n measures root crowding.
planning_constraints: Start with computational experiments for small n (n=2,3,4,5) to build intuition.
Explore both direct algebraic approaches and probabilistic/free-probability interpretations.
The connection between Phi_n and the Hessian of the log-discriminant may be useful.
Do not assume the result; derive every step from the seeds.
